name: Full Compliance Audit
description: On-demand full compliance scan. Triggers the audit agent to score the project against all applicable rules for the current tier and phase.

then.prompt:
Run a full compliance audit using the specification in .governance/agents/compliance-audit-agent.md.

Steps:
1. Read .compliance-state.json → determine current tier, phase, and applicable rules
2. Load ALL .governance/rules/*.md files
3. For each rule applicable to the current tier AND current phase:
   - Check if the project satisfies the rule
   - Record: pass, fail, or warn
4. Calculate compliance score: (passing / applicable) × 100
5. Apply severity weighting (see scoring-model.md)
6. Determine rating: ✅ (90+) / 🟡 (70-89) / 🟠 (50-69) / 🔴 (0-49)
7. Check active exceptions (exclude from scoring)
8. Check open remediations (past-SLA items)
9. Generate audit report at docs/compliance-reports/{today}-audit.md
10. Update docs/compliance-dashboard.md with new score + history entry
11. Update .compliance-state.json with lastAudit date and complianceScore
12. Present summary with top findings and recommended actions

## Compliance Logging
After audit completes, write AUDIT event to `compliance-log/snapshots/{today}-audit.json`:
{"timestamp": "{ISO-8601-UTC}", "type": "audit", "id": "aud-{date}-{time}-001", "phase": "{current_phase}", "score": {score}, "rating": "{rating}", "totalRules": {total}, "passing": {passing}, "failing": {failing}, "criticalFailures": {count}, "activeExceptions": {count}, "openRemediations": {count}, "triggeredBy": "user"}
